nodes.label: Privacy Audit Gate (AI sees no student data until audit passes)
nodes.rationale: The audit step is mandatory and runs before any AI draft. No data is sent to the AI until the audit completes. High-risk files block drafting entirely. This is a product requirement, not optional.
nodes.norm_label: privacy audit gate (ai sees no student data until audit passes)

nodes.label: Stale-While-Revalidate API Cache Pattern
nodes.rationale: The api.ts request() function implements SWR: returns cached value immediately if fresh, returns stale while revalidating in background, deduplicates in-flight requests. Avoids redundant backend calls during rapid UI interactions.

nodes.label: Manual Classroom Posting (API limitation)
nodes.rationale: The Classroom API does not allow auto-posting grades/feedback to teacher-created assignments. GraderWrap provides a copy-paste + manual-confirm flow to assist teachers instead of blocking them.
